title: Task-6 Viewing Task Details (The R in CRUD)

content.problemStatement:
Currently, users can see a list of their tasks, but they can't click on one to see all of its details, such as the full description or any attachments. Your goal now is to create the **"Read"** functionality by building a dedicated detail page for each individual task. \
**You will do this by:**
1. Creating a new `task_detail` view that fetches a single task from the database based on its ID.
2. Defining a new URL pattern that includes the **task's ID**, for example, `/tasks/1/` or `/tasks/5/`.
3. Creating a new template, `task_detail.html`, to display all the fields of the fetched task.
4. Updating the `task_list.html` template to make each task's title a clickable link that navigates to its new detail page.

**Files to Modify:**
- `tasks/views.py` (To add the task_detail view)
- `tasks/urls.py` (To add the dynamic `/` URL)
- `tasks/templates/tasks/task_detail.html` (New file for the detail page)
- `tasks/templates/tasks/task_list.html` (To add links to the detail pages) - This has been done for you. Check the block between `` and ``

**After completing the above:**
- Click on **RUN** to start the server. Open the browser in new tab.
- Login with the credentials `chef` `chefpass@123` or register and create a new account and login.
- Create a new task. 
- Now under the task lists for that user, you should be able to see the Task Title as a blue link:



- Click on the task link and you should be able to see all details of that task as shown below:
